tools.Name: Deep-Live-Cam
tools.Description: A tool for real-time face swapping and video deepfakes using only a single image.
tools.Use_Case: Creating engaging content, animation of custom characters, and real-time live streaming filters.

tools.Name: VibeVoice
tools.Description: A family of open-source voice AI models supporting long-form speech recognition (ASR) and real-time/long-form text-to-speech (TTS).
tools.Use_Case: Transcribing 60-minute long-form audio into structured data and generating expressive, multi-speaker conversational speech.

tools.Name: ChatDev
tools.Description: A zero-code platform for orchestrating multi-agent systems to automate complex workflows like software development, data visualization, and research.
tools.Use_Case: Building and executing customized multi-agent pipelines for tasks ranging from software engineering to complex scientific research.
